allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Printer | Format-Table Name, DriverName, PortName, PrinterStatus -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.FriendlyName -match 'barigan|BG-IN|printer' -and \\$_.Class -match 'Printer|USB' } | Format-Table FriendlyName, Status, Class, InstanceId -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice -Class USB | Where-Object { \\$_.Status -eq 'OK' } | Format-Table FriendlyName, Status, InstanceId -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.Status -eq 'OK' -and \\$_.Class -match 'Printer|Print' } | Format-Table FriendlyName, Status, Class, InstanceId -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice -Class USB | Format-Table FriendlyName, Status, InstanceId -AutoSize")
